mapper.sql: session_id AS "sessionId", resume_id AS "resumeId", last_slots_json AS "lastSlotsJson", jobs_json AS "jobsJson", tool_events_json AS "toolEventsJson", resume_match_json AS "resumeMatchJson", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session_state( session_id, resume_id, last_slots_json, jobs_json, tool_events_json, resume_match_json, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{state.sessionId}, #{state.resumeId}, #{state.lastSlotsJson}, #{state.jobsJson}, #{state.toolEventsJson}, #{state.resumeMatchJson}, #{state.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session_state SET resume_id = #{state.resumeId}, last_slots_json = #{state.lastSlotsJson}, jobs_json = #{state.jobsJson}, tool_events_json = #{state.toolEventsJson}, resume_match_json = #{state.resumeMatchJson}, updated_at = #{state.updatedAt} WHERE session_id = #{state.sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message_log( session_id, role, content, metadata_json, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{metadataJson}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, metadata_json AS "metadataJson" FROM chat_message_log WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND role = 'assistant' AND metadata_json LIKE '%jobCards%' ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.session_id AS "sessionId", s.resume_id AS "resumeId", s.updated_at AS "updatedAt", ( SELECT content FROM chat_message_log m WHERE m.session_id = s.session_id ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS "firstMessage" FROM chat_session_state s ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT role, content, metadata_json AS "metadataJson", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM chat_message_log WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
